张桂芳因为一次意外，穿越到了洪荒大陆，封神时期。
成为了青龙关总兵，伐周先锋，兵临西岐城下。
在知道自己的天庭编制为丧门星之后，及时绑定了刀刀爆物资系统。
只要砍人，就能爆出各种物资。
从此张桂芳的人生信条只有一个：是兄弟就让我砍一刀。
多年后，通天以副教主之位邀请张桂芳加入截教，那就请教主赴死，让我先砍一刀。
通天：好好好，你来真的是吧，你是想把我这个教主送上封神榜！
张桂芳：太清圣人，你躲在八景宫好吗？你也不想玄都被砍死吧？
多年后，通天闭关而出，却发现整个截教空无一人。
通天：你疯了吧，不会把整个截教都砍了吧！
上岸第一刀，先砍意中人！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/01f8fe08e586d6c6c6c1004c8b8314e6","author":"一饮三百杯","author_id":"","book_id":"7358829320082557976","book_name":"封神：我有一刀，请诸位道友上榜","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#383840","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"6402人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":66,"name":"洪荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66&name=洪荒&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":373,"name":"西游衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=373&name=西游衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7360110780118729240","read_count":"6402","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"368430"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.5","serial_count":"176","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿
